channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: M&s shopping trolley been dumped, 24th May
item.description:
Please collect before it gets thrown back into the river. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravens Close, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: AGAIN!!! Same spot, same problem!!!, 24th May
item.description:
Every day stuff’s being dumped here - and it’s been going on for years!!! I’ve screamed CAMERA!!! But no. However, the council HAVE just installed cameras 15 metres away to deter the odd motorist. PRIORITIES?!?!?!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61a, Dartmouth Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree hanging over front garden, 24th May
item.description:
Tree very over grown bits always falling in to front garden and on to parked cars

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste from foxes, 24th May
item.description:
Foxes have torn apart some dumped rubbish bags and left rotting food all over the street on Cerise Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14-16, Hanover Park, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 Streatley Road (by Burton Road), NW6 7LJ, 24th May
item.description:
Some sofas (POPs), a wardrobe, a mattress, and what looks like a large trolley

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Streatley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Dangerous Parking Obstruction at 37 Celandine Drive, 24th May
item.description:
I am writing to formally complain about vehicles regularly parking outside designated bays in the cul-de-sac section of this car park.This unauthorized parking causes a severe nuisance and blocks access for all residents on this side of the parking area. Specifically, cars parking between the designated bays and the boundary fence leave insufficient room for maneuvering. As the owner of a large vehicle, I am routinely trapped and unable to safely reverse out of my bay.This persistent obstruction is unacceptable. Please take immediate enforcement action or install clear "No Parking" signage to resolve this issue.Yours sincerely, Gabriel Dragomir, 37 Celandine Drive SE28 8EP

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Celandine Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress, 24th May
item.description:
Flytipped mattress on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 165, Lower Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Refuse bin filled and abandoned, 24th May
item.description:
Big household waste bin filled and over spilling, attracting flies. Been here for days now, really unsightly and health and safety issue as kids use the area
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingswood Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Removal of litter, 24th May
item.description:
Please can someone remove the rubbish today I saw you out yesterday which was a bit pointless it’s now a lot worse today and tomorrow will be even worse

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Five Arches, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish being dumped constantly in the alleyway between 265 and 277 Upper Wickham Lane,DA16 3AP. Flying tipping is happening constantly despite the nearby CCTV Pole., 24th May
item.description:
Rubbish being dumped constantly in the alleyway between 265 and 277 Upper Wickham Lane,DA16 3AP. Fly-tipping is happening constantly despite the nearby CCTV Pole.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stuart Road, East Wickham, Greater London
